items.title: Oil, silver trading is way more popular than XRP, solana on Hyperliquid
items.whyYouShouldCare: The growing popularity of oil and silver trading on Hyperliquid highlights a potential shift in liquidity away from cryptocurrencies like XRP and Solana.

items.title: Resolv stablecoin crashes 70% as attacker extracts $25 million in ETH
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant crash of Resolv stablecoin and the $25 million theft could undermine trust in stablecoins, impacting overall market stability and liquidity.

items.title: Stablecoin usage up 600% – Is USDC taking the lead from USDT?
items.whyYouShouldCare: A 600% increase in stablecoin usage, particularly with USDC gaining traction over USDT, signals evolving preferences that could influence Solana's ecosystem and liquidity.
